Patient Information Leaflet for dossier VET-NEW-BIO-AMR-OXYT-0123.
Product: Oxytetracycline 200 mg/mL injectable solution (oxytetracycline); strength 200 mg/mL; route intramuscular.
Applicant: WellSpring Regulatory Services Ltd (Kenya); Manufacturer: Lakeview Biopharma Ltd (Egypt).
PIL Section: What this medicine is and what it is used for.
PIL Route and Form: Route=intramuscular; Dosage form=injectable solution; Strength=200 mg/mL.
PIL Instructions: Follow the prescribed dose schedule. Do not exceed recommended dose.
PIL Warnings: Reference-aligned warning: observe prudent antimicrobial use. Reference-aligned warning: do not exceed labelled dose in food-producing animals.
PIL Storage: Store below 30C and protect from direct sunlight.
PIL Adverse Effects: Common effects include gastrointestinal upset and headache; serious effects require urgent review.
Antimicrobial Classification: Watch; stewardship warning and prudent-use statement included.

SmPC for dossier VET-NEW-BIO-AMR-OXYT-0123.
Product: Oxytetracycline 200 mg/mL injectable solution (oxytetracycline); strength 200 mg/mL; route intramuscular.
Applicant: WellSpring Regulatory Services Ltd (Kenya); Manufacturer: Lakeview Biopharma Ltd (Egypt).
SmPC 4.1 Therapeutic indications: As approved in the application form.
SmPC 4.2 Posology and method of administration: Dose by age/weight and clinical condition as approved.
SmPC 4.3 Contraindications: hypersensitivity to tetracyclines.
SmPC 4.4 Special warnings and precautions: withdrawal periods must be observed; antimicrobial stewardship precautions apply.
SmPC 4.8 Undesirable effects: nausea, diarrhoea, rash, dizziness; serious adverse reactions listed.
SmPC 6.4 Special precautions for storage: store according to label and stability commitments.
Antimicrobial Classification: Watch; stewardship warning and prudent-use statement included.
